roadman-cycling.name: Roadman Cycling
roadman-cycling.description: MCP server for the Roadman Cycling platform. Provides semantic search over 1,400+ podcast episodes, expert coaching insights, training methodology, product catalogue, upcoming events, and community statistics. Useful for any AI assistant helping cyclists learn, train, or join the Roadman community.

tools.name: get_community_stats
tools.description: Current podcast downloads, YouTube subscribers, and community member counts

tools.name: search_episodes
tools.description: Semantic search across Roadman podcast episode library

tools.name: get_episode
tools.description: Full metadata for a specific episode by ID

tools.name: list_experts
tools.description: Expert guest roster sorted by appearance count

tools.name: get_expert_insights
tools.description: Key quotes and insights from a named expert

tools.name: search_methodology
tools.description: Semantic search over Roadman coaching methodology principles

tools.name: list_upcoming_events
tools.description: Upcoming group rides, live Q&As, and training camps

tools.name: qualify_lead
tools.description: Recommends the right product tier based on a cyclist's profile and goals

resources.description: Brand identity, voice, and audience overview
Five content pillars and core training methodology
Named expert credentials and specialist areas
